title: PJB6_YS1 model steps 30 - 39
author: Jourdon, Anthony
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
3D StagYY model associated to the publication: Claire Mallard, Nicolas Coltice, Maria Seton, R. Dietmar Müller & Paul J. Tackley (2016) Subduction controls the distribution and fragmentation of Earth’s tectonic plates.  Nature   535 , 140–143 (2016). https://doi.org/10.1038/nature17992 
 This data set purpose is to be used with notebooks / tutorials for the python package stagpyviz:  https://github.com/anthony-jourdon/stagpyviz
